q: Do you want to be an artist?
examiner_note: Nói về đam mê vs. thực tế. Sử dụng 'talent', 'dedication', 'appreciator', 'creative outlet'.

band7.text: While I enjoy being creative as a hobby, I don't think I have the level of talent or dedication required to pursue it as a professional career. I'm happy being an appreciator of art instead. It’s nice to have it as a creative outlet.
band7.note: Trả lời khiêm tốn và thực tế, từ vựng ổn (talent, dedication, appreciator, creative outlet).

band8.text: As much as I admire artists, I don't see myself pursuing it professionally. I find great satisfaction in creating art for my own pleasure, but I lack the relentless drive and specialized skill set that being a successful artist demands. I'm content with keeping it as a therapeutic pastime.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên và mạnh (relentless drive, specialized, content with, therapeutic pastime).

band9.text: While I harbor a deep-seated passion for artistic expression, I’ve never seriously entertained the idea of becoming a professional artist. I recognize the immense challenges and the precarious nature of the art world. For me, art remains a vital form of personal exploration rather than a career path I wish to tread.
band9.note: Sử dụng ngôn ngữ tinh tế (harbor, deep-seated, entertained the idea, precarious, tread).

v.meaning: nơi giải tỏa sự sáng tạo
v.example: Writing is my main creative outlet.
Many artists live a precarious existence.

advanced_vocab.example: She has a deep-seated fear of spiders.

similar_questions: What skills do you think an artist needs?
Is it hard to make a living as an artist?
